item.title: Building a Dream Home
item.description: A look at the process of constructing a dream home, from planning to progress on site. Which stage interests you the most?

item.title: Laying the Foundations for a Build
item.description: Follow the early stages of construction as foundations are prepared and set for a new project. What step do you think is most important in a strong build?

media:content.media:description: Follow the early stages of construction as foundations are prepared and set for a new project. What step do you think is most important in a strong build?

item.title: Perkins Builder Brothers: Cabin Day 46
item.description: Day 46 of the cabin build brings new progress, challenges, and key construction steps as the project continues to take shape. What milestones are reached at this stage?

item.title: Reviving an Old Deck
item.description: An aging deck gets a fresh start with careful repair and craftsmanship. What techniques bring it back to life?

item.description: Strong foundations are the start of every great build. How do the brothers ensure cabin footings stand the test of time?

item.title: Floor Material Check
item.description: Durability meets design as different floor materials are put to the test. Which option stands up best?
